messages.content: подсократите текст на английском: ON STAGE, alongside ED, his wife MARIA shares his PRIDE, and TOGETHER with their COLLEAGUES, they stand PRESENTING the fruits of their TIRELESS labors, now ready to yield the long-awaited RESULTS.
On stage, Ed is joined by his wife Maria, both proud, as they and their colleagues unveil the outcomes of their relentless work, now poised to deliver anticipated results.
C несколько верхними регистрами
On stage, Ed and his wife Maria share their PRIDE as they, together with COLLEAGUES, present the results of their tireless efforts.

C несколько верхними регистрами: On stage, Ed is joined by his wife Maria, both proud, as they and their colleagues unveil the outcomes of their relentless work, now poised to deliver anticipated results.
On stage, Ed, with his wife Maria, radiate PRIDE, alongside COLLEAGUES, as they unveil the hard-earned RESULTS of their relentless efforts.
Эту надо сделать:  On stage, Ed is joined by his wife Maria, both proud, as they and their colleagues unveil the outcomes of their relentless work, now poised to deliver anticipated results.
On stage, Ed and Maria, united in PRIDE, with COLLEAGUES, reveal the fruit of their steadfast labor, set to bring forth expected RESULTS.
Не изменяя текст!!!
On stage, Ed is joined by his wife Maria, both PROUD, as they and their COLLEAGUES unveil the outcomes of their relentless work, now poised to deliver anticipated RESULTS.
Больше верхних регистров здесь: On stage, Ed, with his wife Maria, radiate PRIDE, alongside COLLEAGUES, as they unveil the hard-earned RESULTS of their relentless efforts.
On stage, Ed, with his wife Maria, radiate PRIDE, alongside their COLLEAGUES, as they unveil the hard-earned RESULTS of their relentless efforts.
Не вижу изменений

Apologies for the confusion. Here's the revised sentence:

ON STAGE, Ed, with wife Maria, radiates PRIDE, with COLLEAGUES, presenting hard-earned RESULTS of relentless work.
